parents.subject: LU-18222 doc: update man page with lqa_quota_ops

commit.subject: LU-18941 tests: fix sanity/119j HIO aarch64 read size
commit.message:
LU-18941 tests: fix sanity/119j HIO aarch64 read size

On aarch64 clients the 4KB read was only accessing a partial page,
which occasionally caused a cache miss.  Always read a full page.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 240cad9a0a ("LU-19344 llite: set read size correctly")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: Iad61f97d3109dfca14fec07471b3a488934bd154
